## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Navigate to '...'
2. Call endpoint '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened. Include the full error message or stack trace.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.14]
- Branch: [e.g. main]
- Okta SDK version (if relevant):

## Logs / Screenshots
Paste relevant logs here (redact any credentials or PII).
